# Global Memory Index (auto-generated)

## Active Rules (0)

_No global rules yet. Rules are captured automatically from corrections._

## Active Axioms (7)
- [[execution]] — Trace all callers, dependencies, stale refs before modifying code
- [[analysis]] — Read before writing, understand why, map blast radius
- [[quality]] — The PR test, zero stale refs, complete work
- [[mindset]] — Think in consequences, fix if cost ~0, source-grounded
- [[completion]] — Plans are promises. Boil the Lake. No silent scope reduction.
- [[design]] — Anti-slop blacklist, OKLCH color, typography, spatial composition.
- [[skeptic]] — Every plan survives the failure gauntlet. No happy-path-only plans.
